description: Composition:Black round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitIf patriotism is what oozes from your heart, then this tee from tantra is the perfect way to showcase your love and commitment  to the country. Team this with jeans or cargoes for casual outings or hanging out with friends.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
